lea:title: The Pitch Science Fiction 3Q2025
lea:author: Eduard Pech
lea:description: The Pitch Science Fiction is a quarterly publication of science fiction stories by various authors, covering diverse themes. Included in this issue: Table Of Contents Plain
lea:rights: All texts and illustrations not explicitly declared as being in the public domain are copyright 2026 by Eduard Pech or by their respective authors. The complete edition is copyright 2026 by Logophilia Essentials. Logophilia Essentials is an imprint of Logophilia OÜ.
lea:text: The Celestial Blueprint by Philip Jose Farmer.xhtml
Valley of Dreams by Stanley G. Weinbaum.xhtml
The Legion of Lazarus by Edmond Hamilton.xhtml
The Magnificent Possession by Isaac Asimov.xhtml
The Variable Man by Philip K. Dick.xhtml
